::: {.panel-tabset}

## Route

<iframe
  src="{{ map_src }}"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

{{ hazards_table_html }}

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="{{ chunk_map_src }}"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

{{ chunk_sections_table_html }}

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="{{ road_quality_map_src }}"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

{{ road_quality_table_html }}

:::
